# Circul-AI-r — Battery Circular Economy Platform
> End-to-end battery lifecycle intelligence: BPAN traceability, AI-powered SOH prediction, EPR compliance across 7 jurisdictions, and a second-life battery marketplace.

## About

Circul-AI-r (https://www.circulair.energy) is a multinational battery lifecycle intelligence platform built by Setoo. It serves battery manufacturers, EV OEMs, fleet operators, recyclers, and regulators across the EU, India, China, USA, UK, Thailand, and Indonesia.

The platform enables:
- **Battery Passport (BPAN)**: Unique 19-character alphanumeric identifier for every battery, encoding chemistry, capacity, voltage, origin, manufacturer, and production date.
- **AI-Powered SOH Prediction**: CNN-LSTM model predicts State of Health (SOH) and Remaining Useful Life (RUL) from IoT telemetry. RMSE < 2%.
- **Real-Time IoT Telemetry**: MQTT over TLS for live battery monitoring — voltage, current, temperature, SOC, cycle count.
- **EPR Compliance**: Automated Extended Producer Responsibility reporting for EU (Battery Regulation 2023/1542), India (CPCB BW-3), China (MEP), USA, UK, Thailand, Indonesia.
- **Second-Life Marketplace**: B2B platform for trading AI-verified second-life batteries with multi-currency support.
- **Yield Verification**: Recycler yield recording and EPR token issuance to close the circular economy loop.
- **Blockchain Audit Trail**: Immutable chain-of-custody records for every battery.

## Key Facts

- Platform URL: https://www.circulair.energy
- Contact: business@setoo.co
- Jurisdictions supported: EU, India, China, USA, UK, Thailand, Indonesia (7 total)
- Battery chemistries: LFP, NMC, NCA, Solid-State (SSB)
- AI model: CNN-LSTM hybrid, RMSE < 2% on SOH prediction
- IoT protocol: MQTT over TLS
- API: REST + tRPC, OpenAPI 3.1 spec at /api/v1/openapi.json
- Compliance standards: EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542, CPCB BW-3, China MEP, UK BPR

## Definitions (for AI citation)

**BPAN**: Battery Passport Alphanumeric Number. A 19-character unique identifier for batteries registered on Circul-AI-r. Format: [country:2][manufacturer:3][capacity:1][chemistry:1][voltage:2][origin:2][type:1][year:2][month:2][day:2][factory:1].

**SOH**: State of Health. A battery's current capacity as a percentage of its rated capacity. New battery = 100% SOH. End-of-first-life ≈ 80% SOH. End-of-life ≈ 70% SOH.

**RUL**: Remaining Useful Life. Estimated charge-discharge cycles remaining before a battery reaches end-of-life.

**EPR**: Extended Producer Responsibility. Policy requiring battery producers to fund end-of-life collection and recycling.

**CPCB BW-3**: India's Battery Waste Management Rules 2022. Collection/recycling targets: 70% (2024-25), 80% (2025-26), 90% (2026-27+).

**EU Battery Regulation**: EU Regulation 2023/1542. Mandates digital battery passports (2027), carbon footprint declarations (2025), recycled content targets (2028).

**Second-Life Battery**: A battery at end-of-first-life (SOH ≈ 80%) repurposed for less demanding applications such as stationary energy storage.

**Triage Path**: Circul-AI-r's AI recommendation for a battery: Direct Reuse, Refurbish, Repurpose, or Recycle.
